summary: View Followups feature testing completed successfully. All features working as expected - API endpoint returns correct data, UI button visibility is role-based (Admin/Branch Admin only), dialog displays lead info and followup timeline correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: View Followups button correctly uses role-based visibility check: (user.role === 'Admin' || user.role === 'Branch Admin')
API endpoint GET /api/leads/{lead_id}/followups returns followups sorted by created_at descending
Dialog displays lead info (name, phone, status) and followup timeline with notes, dates, and creator names
data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing (view-followups-button-{id}, followup-item-{index})

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all role-based visibility and dialog functionality verified)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (Lead 'John Smith' with 2 followups)
